name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: ism manufacturing pmi|ism manufacturing index|ism mfg pmi|manufacturing pmi (ism)
notes: Headline US ISM Manufacturing PMI. Moved from Tier 2 DB.nomics (stale) to Tier 3 FMP. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name.

name: ISM Manufacturing New Orders
event_patterns: ism new orders|ism manufacturing new orders|manufacturing new orders index
notes: ISM Mfg sub-index. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name. May not be on FMP; if not found, drop US_PMI2.

name: ISM Services PMI (Non-Manufacturing)
event_patterns: ism services pmi|ism non-manufacturing pmi|ism nm pmi|non-manufacturing pmi|services pmi (ism)
notes: ISM Services PMI. Moved from Tier 2 DB.nomics (stale) to Tier 3 FMP. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name.

name: ISM Services Business Activity
event_patterns: ism business activity|ism services business activity|ism nm business activity
notes: ISM Services sub-index. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name. May not be on FMP; if not found, drop from calculator.

name: S&P Global Eurozone Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: eurozone manufacturing pmi|hcob eurozone manufacturing pmi
notes: S&P Global / HCOB Eurozone Mfg PMI; >50 = expansion. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name.

name: S&P Global Eurozone Services PMI
event_patterns: eurozone services pmi|hcob eurozone services pmi
notes: S&P Global / HCOB Eurozone Services PMI; >50 = expansion. UNVERIFIED — run poc_fmp_calendar.py to confirm event name.

name: ZEW Economic Sentiment
event_patterns: zew economic sentiment|germany zew economic sentiment
notes: ZEW Financial Market Survey; positive = optimistic; leads GDP by 6-9m. UNVERIFIED.

name: IFO Business Climate
event_patterns: ifo business climate|germany ifo business climate
notes: IFO Business Climate Index; composite of current assessment + expectations. UNVERIFIED.

name: S&P Global UK Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: uk manufacturing pmi|s&p global uk manufacturing pmi
notes: S&P Global / CIPS UK Mfg PMI; >50 = expansion. UNVERIFIED.

name: Jibun Bank Japan Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: japan manufacturing pmi|jibun bank japan manufacturing pmi|au jibun bank japan manufacturing pmi
notes: au Jibun Bank (S&P Global) Japan Mfg PMI; >50 = expansion. UNVERIFIED.

name: NBS China Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: chinese manufacturing pmi|china manufacturing pmi|nbs manufacturing pmi
notes: NBS official China Mfg PMI; >50 = expansion; large-enterprise bias. UNVERIFIED.

name: Caixin China Manufacturing PMI
event_patterns: caixin manufacturing pmi|caixin china manufacturing pmi|caixin china general manufacturing pmi
notes: Caixin / S&P Global China Mfg PMI; private SME-focused; complement to NBS. UNVERIFIED.
